home.playNowDescription: The GeoGuessr for video games. Free to play in your browser — no download required. Jump into a solo game or invite up to 7 friends for a multiplayer session.
home.dropIntoDescription: Drop into iconic locations from your favorite video game universes and guess exactly where you are. The closer your guess, the more points you earn — but your friends are racing against you.
home.createLobbyDescription: Create a lobby in seconds, share your code, and compete in real-time with up to 8 players. Every round is a fresh challenge.
home.multiplayerDescription: Invite up to 7 friends and battle it out in real-time. Create a lobby in seconds, share the code, and see who truly knows their video game geography best.
home.specialRoundsDescription: Don't leave it to chance. Special Rounds lets you hand-pick the scene for each round, so you can build themed challenges, focus on specific games, or set the difficulty exactly how you want it.
home.latestNewsDescription: Stay up to date with the latest Geo Gamer news — new scenes, multiplayer updates, and community events.
home.metaTitle: Geo Gamer — Guess Iconic Video Game Locations with Friends
home.metaDescription: Explore 300+ scenes from iconic video game worlds and guess where you are. Play solo or challenge up to 7 friends in real-time multiplayer. Free, no download required.

auth.createAccountDescription: Enter your email below to create your account
auth.emailNote: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email with anyone else.
auth.passwordNote: Must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.termsAgreement: By clicking continue, you agree to our

lobby.onlyHostCanStart: Only the host can start the lobby
lobby.onlyHostCanChange: Only the host can change the lobby config
lobby.lobbyNoLongerAccepting: This lobby is no longer accepting players
lobby.mustBeLogged: You need to be logged to join the lobby

dailyChallenge.title: Daily Challenge
dailyChallenge.pubTitle: Discover daily challenges and compete with the world
dailyChallenge.pubDescription: Every day, a new challenge is generated and available for all players. Compete with your friends and the world to reach the best streak!
dailyChallenge.shareTitle: Share this challenge to your friends
dailyChallenge.shareDescription: Thanks for playing this challenge. You discover {gameTitle}
dailyChallenge.failedCopy: Failed to copy the challenge link. Please try again.

account.title: Account Settings
account.profilePictureDescription: Your avatar visible to other players
account.pseudoDescription: This is the name other players will see
account.emailDescription: Your email address cannot be changed here

changePseudo.title: Personalize your account
changePseudo.description: Your pseudo and your avatar is what other users see when they interact with you. Choose something that represents you well!

makeSuggestion.title: Make a suggestion
makeSuggestion.success: Thanks for your suggestion! You help to improve this project :)

finishedLobbyAnonymous.title: Thanks for playing the demo!
finishedLobbyAnonymous.description: To access all features and play with your friends, please create an account. It's quick and easy!

footer.tagline: TWO STICKS AND THEN FIRE. THAT IS ALL IT TAKES. NOT SO DIFFICULT. NOT SO COMPLEX. PROMETHEUS WASN'T A GENIUS. HE WAS SIMPLY A THIEF WHO CHANGED THE WORLD.

racePage.description: A fresh seed will be generated automatically when you start.

raceMode.title: Race Mode
raceMode.description: Race against the clock in this fast-paced, high-intensity game mode. Every second counts. Perfect for players who thrive under pressure and want to test their knowledge.
